sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41656" key="e)pixorta/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιχορτάζω</orth>, <sense id="n41656.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">supply with provender,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0340.tlg001:2:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sosith.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
